title: Polly of the Storm Country
writer: Frank Mitchell Dazey, Grace Miller White
actors: Mildred Harris, Emory Johnson, Charlotte Burton
plot: The Hopkinses are a family of squatters struggling against the wealthy landowners or "hilltoppers." When Jerry Hopkins is unjustly imprisoned, his young wife and baby die as a result of the shock, but his sister Polly maintains th...
